Seminar note 06 / Observation482 words · 4 phrases
Teaching draft · Week 06

The Practice
of Noticing

A short note on observation, shared language, and what changes when a group reads together.

R. Adeyemi · Learning studio

Observation begins when becomes a shared practice. It asks us to hold before reaching for an answer.

In a group, notes become . The point is not to agree immediately, but to another reader can return to.

AK Aya KimSeminar lead · now
